params.SpellDescription: Put a +1/+1 counter on each other Squirrel you control. (To forage, exile three cards from your graveyard or sacrifice a Food.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Put a +1/+1 counter on each other Squirrel you control. (To forage, exile three cards from your graveyard or sacrifice a Food.)

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you sacrifice one or more Foods, create a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token.

params.Description: Other Squirrels you control have menace.
